shared.name: TreeCanvas.tsx
shared.description: Config-driven tree renderer — horizontal / vertical / radial / mindmap / org layouts, pan/zoom, inline editing, native pointer drag. Zero external deps.

shared.name: treeLayout.ts
shared.description: Pure layout algorithms (horizontal, vertical, radial, mindmap, org).

shared.name: types.ts
shared.description: Public types: TreeNode, TreeCanvasConfig, NodeRenderer, event payloads.

shared.name: graph/types.ts
shared.description: GraphFilterState + GraphPredicate + NodeDataset contracts (shared with the toolbar).

files.name: graph/index.ts
files.description: Public surface for the search / sort / filter toolbar.

files.name: graph/GraphToolbar.tsx
files.description: Search / sort / filter bar that overlays a TreeCanvas (config.showToolbar).

files.name: graph/useGraphFilter.ts
files.description: Hook that applies the toolbar's search/sort/filter to a tree.
